title: Encore Infrastructure Resource
description: Schema describing a declarative infrastructure resource produced by Encore's Infrastructure from Code parser.

service.description: Encore service that owns the resource.

local.description: How the resource is provisioned locally (e.g. docker-postgres, in-memory-pubsub, local-bucket).

aws.description: AWS managed resource Encore Cloud provisions (e.g. rds-postgres, sqs+sns, s3).

gcp.description: GCP managed resource Encore Cloud provisions (e.g. cloud-sql-postgres, pubsub, gcs).

config.description: Resource-specific configuration (delivery guarantee, retention, versioning, schedule, etc.).
